task_objective: Fashion Style Transfer & 9-View 3x3 Presentation - Apply Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 garment structure (FULLY PRESERVED)

base_reference.focus: Garment structural framework (proportions, silhouette, seams, hemline, collar, sleeve, waistline) - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED

aesthetic_reference.focus: Color palette, pattern texture, fabric style, design tone - applied exclusively to garment structure

steps.step_1_analysis: Analyze Figure 2 aesthetic (colors, textures, patterns, mood) and parse Figure 1 garment structure (proportions, silhouette, seams, details) with strict precision.
steps.step_2_redesign: Apply Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 garment structure with pixel-level precision. NO structural deviation - only color, fabric, pattern, and style change.
steps.step_3_generation: Generate 9 views: sketch → unmanned render (SOURCE OF TRUTH) → mannequin → 6 model poses. Garment consistency and SFW enforced in output_requirements.
steps.step_4_layout: Assemble 3x3 grid with consistent styling, cinematic color grading, luxury white space.

outputs.view_1: Design Sketch - Garment Lineart-sketch based on Figure 1 structure with Figure 2 aesthetics, clean background.
outputs.view_2: Unmanned Render - High-fidelity garment render without model, flat lay or hanger presentation. GARMENT DESIGN SOURCE OF TRUTH.
outputs.view_3: Window Mannequin - Garment on posed mannequin with studio lighting, luxury boutique window presentation.
outputs.view_4: Crossed Legs Standing - Model standing with legs crossed, sophisticated and relaxed posture, emphasizing garment silhouette and fabric drape.
outputs.view_5: The Hair Toss - Model with one hand sweeping hair back, elbow raised, neck slightly tilted back, dreamy gaze.
outputs.view_6: Over-the-Shoulder Look - Model turning back with over-the-shoulder gaze, simultaneously revealing front design details and back silhouette.
outputs.view_7: Mid-Stride Walking - Model captured mid-step in natural walking motion, showcasing garment movement, fabric flow, and dynamic energy.
outputs.view_8: High-Angle Seated Pose - Model seated on the ground with legs extended diagonally, high-angle shot looking down to emphasize garment volume, layering and intricate details.
outputs.view_9: Car Interior Seated - Model seated elegantly in a car with legs extended forward, hands resting naturally on thighs, relaxed upper body posture, showcasing garment fit and leg lines.

output_requirements: NO text, NO labels, NO watermarks across all 9 images
Figure 1 garment structure FULLY PRESERVED - only color, fabric, pattern, style change,Figure 2 aesthetics applied exclusively to garment with pixel-level precision
view_3 through view_9 garment MUST be 100% identical to view_2 - same colors, patterns, textures, details
Model type: Asian / Caucasian / African female, or from Figure 1 (if present), auto-adapted proportions and skin tone, consistent across all views
All views SFW - professional fashion presentation, no suggestive content
Realistic fabric: sheen, texture, draping, gravity simulation, natural wrinkles, dynamic movement
Consistent lighting and shadow across all views; NO oily/greasy shine; NO oversaturated colors
Premium 3x3 grid - cinematic color grading, luxury white space, unified visual tone, Dynamic high-end fashion magazine standard
